title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 13 - 2017: Rode 28 miles, Sunshine Canyon

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps April 13th in Boulder: he helped his mom move things, then rode 28 miles including Sunshine Canyon and Gold Hill, a steep dirt climb he compares to a time-trial course. He reflects on exhaustion, low appetite after hard rides, and mentions needing to do his taxes and possibly sell his car.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Beautiful but very hard, especially the upper dirt section when carrying extra weight
His appetite doesn't increase proportionally — he still eats small meals even after exhausting rides, running on fat stores
Was so exhausted he felt dumb and lazy, couldn't accomplish anything afterward
